$comment: Project-level Claude Code settings for claude-code-routines. Prompt bodies are pinned through vendor/ai-llm-prompts; deployment metadata remains in routines/registry.yaml. The disabled GHA deploy path is documented in .github/workflows/deploy-routines.yml.

hooks.command: jq -r 'if ((.tool_input.file_path // "") | test("(vendor/ai-llm-prompts/automation/routine-[^/]+\\.md|routines/registry\\.yaml)$")) then "Routine catalog or deployment metadata edited. The GHA deploy workflow is disabled — invoke .claude/skills/deploy-routine-changes/SKILL.md before ending the session so RemoteTrigger drift is assessed with the central renderer." else empty end' >&2
